description_long: This hammer features a robust, angular head with a dark metallic finish and multiple geometric facets, giving it a modern, industrial appearance. The head is large and blocky, with pronounced edges and a central striking face, suggesting it is designed for heavy-duty tasks. The handle is long, straight, and slender, constructed from a dark material that appears to be either metal or reinforced composite, and it connects securely to the head with a reinforced collar. The overall design is utilitarian, with no visible ergonomic grip enhancements or texturing on the handle, emphasizing durability over comfort. The color palette is dominated by deep blues and blacks, with subtle highlights that accentuate the hammer's mechanical and somewhat futuristic aesthetic. There are no visible brand markings, wear, or additional attachments on the hammer.
description: A heavy-duty, angular hammer with a blocky, dark metallic head and a long, straight handle, finished in deep blue and black tones.
description_view_0: Side view showing the hammer's angular, faceted head and the full length of its straight handle.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the central striking face and the symmetrical, geometric design of the head.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the head's layered construction and the handle's attachment point.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the hammer's head and the uninterrupted length of the handle.
attribute_handle_type: straight composite or metal handle, smooth surface, no visible grip enhancements
attribute_head_type: blocky, angular sledge-type head with a central striking face and geometric facets
